meaning: n.文凭,毕业证书,证明权力、特权、荣誉等的证书,奖状
examples: Satisfactory completion of the course will lead to the award of the Diploma of Social Work.
Only 18.8% of the class of 1982 had some kind of diploma four years after high school, versus 45% of the class of 1972.
I've just finished Level 2 diploma on design.
The college degree now increasingly represents what the high school diploma did in 1950 or 1960.
Still, in this economy, a high school diploma no longer guarantees a good job.
